<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the sections below so the change
is easy to review.
-->

### What does this change?

<!-- A one-sentence summary. -->

### Why?

<!-- The problem it solves, or the user need it addresses. -->

### How was it tested?

<!-- "pytest is green", "tested manually with these steps", etc. -->

### Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to?

<!-- Optional. Tricky bits, intentional trade-offs, follow-up TODOs. -->

---

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Container builds (`docker build .`)
- [ ] No new dependencies, OR added ones are pinned in `requirements.txt`
- [ ] README updated if user-visible behavior changes
